data_coverage_summary: Snowplow APIs / BDP docs has public documentation that indicates analytics events and reporting workflows across events, users, sessions, audiences. Public developer/docs portal.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for event ingestion, audience workflows, and analytics exports rather than physical asset or telemetry integration. Snowplow should be treated as a rest api surface for analytics events and reporting workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Snowplow APIs / BDP docs indicates Public developer/docs portal. The documented surface aligns with analytics events and reporting workflows and covers events, users, sessions, audiences. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates event, user-profile, export, and analytics-reporting workflows used for behavioral data pipelines.
data_points: Reporting, export, or downstream analytics data

ingest_considerations: The public source for Snowplow APIs / BDP docs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as analytics events and reporting workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
